basic.question_text: 查询 Arti st（艺术家）**角色有多少人**。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employees WHERE role = 'Artist';
hints: WHERE role = 'Artist' 然后 COUNT(*)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employees WHERE role = 'Artist';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employees WHERE role = 'Artist';

basic.question_text: 查询**每个角色有多少人**。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT role, COUNT(*) FROM employees GROUP BY role;
hints: GROUP BY role, COUNT(*)
SELECT role, COUNT(*) FROM employees GROUP BY role;
SELECT role, COUNT(*) FROM employees GROUP BY role;

basic.reference_sql: SELECT SUM(years_employed) FROM employees WHERE role = 'Engineer';
hints: SUM(years_employed) WHERE role = 'Engineer'
SELECT SUM(years_employed) FROM employees WHERE role = 'Engineer';
SELECT SUM(years_employed) FROM employees WHERE role = 'Engineer';

basic.question_text: 查询器**员工超过 3 人的角色**及人数。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT role, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM employees GROUP BY role HAVING cnt > 3;
accept_alternatives: SELECT role, COUNT(*) FROM employees GROUP BY role HAVING COUNT(*) > 3;
hints: HAVING COUNT(*) > 3 在分组后筛选
SELECT role, COUNT(*) FROM employees GROUP BY role HAVING COUNT(*) > 3;
SELECT role, COUNT(*) FROM employees GROUP BY role HAVING COUNT(*) > 3;

basic.question_text: 查询**平均工龄超过 5 年的角色**。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT role, AVG(years_employed) AS avg_yrs FROM employees GROUP BY role HAVING avg_yrs > 5;
accept_alternatives: SELECT role, AVG(years_employed) FROM employees GROUP BY role HAVING AVG(years_employed) > 5;
hints: HAVING AVG(years_employed) > 5
SELECT role, AVG(years_employed) FROM employees GROUP BY role HAVING AVG(years_employed) > 5;
SELECT role, AVG(years_employed) FROM employees GROUP BY role HAVING AVG(years_employed) > 5;

intermediate.question_text: 查询**工龄总和超过 20 年的建筑**。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT building, SUM(years_employed) AS total FROM employees WHERE building IS NOT NULL GROUP BY building HAVING total > 20;
hints: SUM(years_employed) > 20
SELECT building, SUM(years_employed) FROM employees WHERE building IS NOT NULL GROUP BY building HAVING SUM(years_employed) > 20;
SELECT building, SUM(years_employed) FROM employees WHERE building IS NOT NULL GROUP BY building HAVING SUM(years_employed) > 20;

intermediate.question_text: 查询建筑中**员工的工龄最小值大于 4 年**的建筑名称。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT building, MIN(years_employed) AS min_yrs FROM employees WHERE building IS NOT NULL GROUP BY building HAVING min_yrs > 4;
accept_alternatives: SELECT building FROM employees WHERE building IS NOT NULL GROUP BY building HAVING MIN(years_employed) > 4;
hints: MIN(years_employed) > 4
SELECT building FROM employees GROUP BY building HAVING MIN(years_employed) > 4;
SELECT building FROM employees GROUP BY building HAVING MIN(years_employed) > 4;

intermediate.question_text: 查询**员工人数在 3 到 5 人之间**的角色。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT role, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM employees GROUP BY role HAVING cnt BETWEEN 3 AND 5;
accept_alternatives: SELECT role, COUNT(*) FROM employees GROUP BY role HAVING COUNT(*)>=3 AND COUNT(*)<=5;
hints: HAVING COUNT(*) BETWEEN 3 AND 5
SELECT role, COUNT(*) FROM employees GROUP BY role HAVING COUNT(*) BETWEEN 3 AND 5;
SELECT role, COUNT(*) FROM employees GROUP BY role HAVING COUNT(*) BETWEEN 3 AND 5;

intermediate.question_text: 查询**每位导演的电影数量**，只显示有 2 部或以上的导演。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT director, COUNT(*) FROM movies GROUP BY director HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2;
hints: HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
SELECT director, COUNT(*) FROM movies GROUP BY director HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2;
SELECT director, COUNT(*) FROM movies GROUP BY director HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2;

intermediate.question_text: 查询**每栋建筑中最高工龄与最低工龄的差值**，只显示差值大于 4 年的建筑。
intermediate.question_context: MAX(years_employed) - MIN(years_employed) AS range, HAVING range > 4。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT building, MAX(years_employed) - MIN(years_employed) AS yr_range FROM employees WHERE building IS NOT NULL GROUP BY building HAVING yr_range > 4;
accept_alternatives: SELECT building, MAX(years_employed)-MIN(years_employed) FROM employees GROUP BY building HAVING MAX(years_employed)-MIN(years_employed)>4;
hints: MAX - MIN AS range，HAVING range > 4
SELECT building, MAX(years_employed)-MIN(years_employed) FROM employees WHERE building IS NOT NULL GROUP BY building HAVING MAX(years_employed)-MIN(years_employed)>4;
SELECT building, MAX(years_employed)-MIN(years_employed) FROM employees WHERE building IS NOT NULL GROUP BY building HAVING MAX(years_employed)-MIN(years_employed)>4;

challenge.question_text: 查询**每个国家中人口大于该国平均人口的城市**。提示：用子查询或 JOIN。
challenge.question_context: SELECT city FROM north_american_cities n1 WHERE population > (SELECT AVG(population) FROM north_american_cities n2 WHERE n1.country = n2.country)。
challenge.reference_sql: SELECT city, country, population FROM north_american_cities n1 WHERE population > (SELECT AVG(population) FROM north_american_cities n2 WHERE n1.country = n2.country) ORDER BY country;
hints: 使用关联子查询：WHERE population > (SELECT AVG(population) FROM north_american_cities WHERE country = n1.country)
SELECT city, country, population FROM north_american_cities n1 WHERE population > (SELECT AVG(population) FROM north_american_cities n2 WHERE n2.country=n1.country);
太难可跳过。基本 HAVING 掌握即可。

challenge.question_text: 查询**拥有超长工龄员工（>8年）的建筑中，各建筑的总工龄**。
challenge.question_context: 先 WHERE years_employed > 8 筛选，再 GROUP BY building。
challenge.reference_sql: SELECT building, SUM(years_employed) FROM employees WHERE years_employed > 8 AND building IS NOT NULL GROUP BY building;
hints: WHERE years_employed > 8 先筛选，再 GROUP BY
SELECT building, SUM(years_employed) FROM employees WHERE years_employed>8 AND building IS NOT NULL GROUP BY building;
SELECT building, SUM(years_employed) FROM employees WHERE years_employed>8 AND building IS NOT NULL GROUP BY building;
